withCaption.heading: Logotype with caption
withCaption.text: Renders a logotype image with a caption label displayed below it.

placeholder.heading: Logotype placeholder
placeholder.text: Renders the placeholder state when no image source is provided, displaying the placeholder text.

withoutRipple.heading: Logotype without ripple
withoutRipple.text: Renders a logotype image with the ripple effect disabled.

aligned.heading: Logotype aligned
aligned.text: Renders a logotype with center alignment applied via the classList modifier class.

linked.heading: Logotype in a link
linked.text: Renders a logotype wrapped in an anchor tag, activating the hover highlight effect.
